login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: A calmer way to meet people who are looking for something real.
login.goToRegister: Don't have an account yet? Create one
login.heroCopy: Discover curated profiles, meaningful details and real conversations in one elegant space.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Build a profile that feels intentional from the first hello.
register.heroTitle: Meet someone who matches your pace
register.heroCopy: Create a polished profile, tune your preferences and step into better conversations.
register.secureNote: You can refine your photos, details and preferences after registration.
register.goToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

modal.accountIntro: Start with your email, then shape the profile people will discover.
modal.profileIntro: These details help Amor suggest people who fit your preferences.

signOut.title: Sign out
signOut.message: Are you sure you want to sign out?

discover.title: Discover
discover.noMoreMatches: No more possible matches for now. Check back later.

dataConsent.heroCopy: Amor uses only the data needed to create your profile, improve matching and protect the community.
dataConsent.title: Your data safety comes first
dataConsent.subtitle: Before continuing, please review and accept the required terms. You stay in control of your data.
dataConsent.ageConfirm: I am at least 18 and above the legal age of consent
dataConsent.analytics: Help Amor improve matching with anonymous analytics (optional)
dataConsent.crashReports: Send crash reports so we can fix issues faster (optional)
dataConsent.personalisation: Use my activity to personalise discovery and offers (optional)
dataConsent.marketing: Send me exclusive offers and product news (optional)
dataConsent.secureStorage: Consent is stored with your profile
dataConsent.personalisedMatches: Used for safer, more relevant discovery

fields.lookingForType: What kind of partner are you looking for?

placeholders.lookingForType: Describe the kind of person you want to meet

deleteConfirm.title: Delete profile?
deleteConfirm.message: This permanently removes your profile, matches and account access from Amor. This action cannot be undone.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Keep the conversation going with your matches.
messages.emptyText: When you match with someone, you can write to them here.
messages.readReceiptText: Find out when {{name}} reads your message.
messages.blockUserHint: Stop this person from contacting you.
messages.reportUserHint: Send this profile for a safety review.
messages.unblockUserHint: Allow messages from this match again.
messages.removeMatchHint: Remove this match from your conversations.
messages.removeMatchConfirmText: You will no longer see this conversation. This action cannot be undone.
messages.reportReasonTitle: Why are you reporting this profile?
messages.reportReasonText: Choose the reason that best describes the issue. Amor will review the report for safety.
messages.blockedBannerText: Messaging is paused until you unblock them.
messages.blockedPlaceholder: Unblock this match to write again.
messages.blockedComposerNotice: Unblock this match before sending a message.
messages.unblockedNotice: This match is unblocked. You can message again.
messages.reportedNotice: Thanks. This report has been marked for review.
messages.startText: A short, personal opener works best.
